_what: SSOT for the 4 Claude Max accounts: identity map (launcher -> config dir -> email -> mailbox -> Dia profile) + router/endpoint config. Consumed by bin/claude-accounts, /accounts, scripts/handoff-fire.sh, skills/account-relogin. Deployed as a symlink at ~/.claude/accounts.json (install.sh); the knowledge-layer mirror shares it into every account config dir.
_secrets: NO tokens live here, ever. OAuth tokens stay in the macOS Keychain (item 'Claude Code-credentials-<sha256(config-dir)[:8]>', account = keychain_account). Emails are fine: this repo is private.
_order: accounts[] order = operator spend priority (next > next4 > next3 > next2, resume-sessions REFERENCE.md operator policy 2026-07-04).

frontier._: Window end/active are READ LIVE from model_config_ssot frontier_access (never hardcode a date — the reso-quota JUL7 lesson). coupling = fable_cap/weekly_cap per SSOT '<=50% of weekly usage limits'. end_date_inclusive: SSOT 'end:' means available THROUGH that date. credits_authorized: keep scoring Fable past the window deadline (deprioritized by CF) instead of hard-excluding — flip only on explicit operator authorization.

router._: Verified scoring constants (design->judge->5 adversarial verifiers, 2026-07-04; see resume-sessions REFERENCE.md section 6). KMAX raised 4 -> 8 on 2026-07-10: the old counter only saw --resume sessions (k<=1); the fixed counter sees ALL live sessions (observed 5-6 on primary accounts as deliberate operator practice), so KMAX=4 would have hard-excluded the priority accounts.
